title: paraboea pyroliflora
intro: Paraboea pyroliflora, also known as the "Wild Lilyturf", is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paraboea pyroliflora include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Paraboea pyroliflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies in the form of decoctions or poultices.
